title: [DOCS] Validate issue templates render correctly in GitHub UI
body:
This is a test issue created by `scripts/issue-batch.js`.

**Purpose:** Verify the batch issue creation workflow works end-to-end.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Issue appears in GitHub with correct labels
- [ ] Template body is readable
- [ ] Batch script logs success

If this issue is open for > 24 hours, close it.
